# Site messaging — research alignment pass (2026-04-13)

## Executive summary

- **Evidence** copy was softened from absolute competitive superiority (“ahead of the field,” “no equivalent”) to **scoped, integration-first** claims; metadata now describes argument style, not unqualified proof.
- **FAQ** “three things converged” was rewritten as **three pressures on the same desk** (product timing + mission), with explicit distance from academic “convergence” ambiguity; **90/10** answers now mention **pass-through payment processing**; theological AI answer no longer implies automatic citation.
- **Vision** and **Movemental at 100** frame **~100 leaders** as **projected / bounded cohort** language, not a live census or Metcalfe-scale “network effects.”
- **NetworkAggregationView** removed the misleading **“training signal” / cross-corpus** implication and reframed bullets as **shared product maturity, permissions-aware linking, translation economies, ecosystem legibility**.
- **Movement leaders**, **home**, and **pricing** economics: **“No extraction” / “Ownership not rental”** replaced with **majority-take framing**, **export/ownership**, and **payment-rail clarity** aligned with competitive-landscape research (Substack/Patreon export reality).
- **System** multi-tenant copy avoids **“global network”** infinite-scale connotation; **knowledge-ecosystem** field view labels **bounded cohort + illustrative** data.

## Claim ledger (high-signal)

| Location | Before (gist) | Verdict | After (gist) |
|----------|-----------------|---------|--------------|
| `evidence/page.tsx` cards | “Ahead of the field,” “no equivalent” | Rephrase | Integration depth, scoped comparators (CMS/course stacks) |
| `evidence/page.tsx` hero | “Trusted because… unusual depth” | Rephrase | “Earn trust,” “integrated formation stack,” “scope not hype” |
| `faq/page.tsx` | “Three things converged” | Rephrase | Pressures + product timing; not academic convergence |
| `faq/page.tsx` | AI “cites sources” | Qualify | “Where configured… human oversight” |
| `faq/page.tsx` | 90% without processor caveat | P0-style | After pass-through processing |
| `vision/page.tsx` | Threshold / “natural result” | Label scenario | Projected state, illustrative bullets, “direction when…” |
| `movemental-at-100` | “Network scale,” shared training | Rephrase | Bounded cohort; community effects / no corpus commingling |
| `NetworkAggregationView` | Corpus “enriches training signal” | **Remove** (misleading) | Shared maturity / governance; legibility |
| `movement-leaders` | “Collapsed,” “rental,” “AI trained” | Rephrase | Strained signals; patchwork tools; AI configured |
| `page.tsx` economics | “No extraction” | Rephrase | No majority platform take; pass-through processing |
| `pricing/page.tsx` | Example $100k, “marketplace majority” | Rephrase | After processing; lion’s share at margin |
| `system/page.tsx` | “Global network,” stacks “can’t match” | Rephrase | Geographies; stitched stacks “struggle to hold” |

## Open questions (for counsel / product)

- Exact **contractual** definition of “90%” vs Stripe fees and any other rails (Apple IAP if ever in scope).
- Whether **NarrativeProjection** or other story components embed strings that still need the same pass (not audited line-by-line in this run).
- **Services / manifesto / churches / nonprofits / apply / assess / case-studies** had no high-confidence hits in grep; spot-review when those pages grow comparative copy.

## Optional glossary (for future edits)

- **Convergence** — use only with gloss: product coupling for an ICP and/or kairos, not Jenkins/Castells unless intended.
- **Network effects** — prefer **community effects, shared infrastructure, discoverability** at **bounded** scale.
- **Proof tier** — requires methodology or source; otherwise use hypothesis / scenario language.
